pages.raw_text:
Complaints are still constantly
coming in of dark electric lights.
The latest is a lamp at Sixth and
Stone that hasn't been lit for the
past three months. The city re-
ports dark lights to the w. w. P.
Co. when compliments phone the
police station. The company is un.
der contract to light the city, but
there is no provision whereby de.
auctions may be made for failure to
do so. The infliction of a penalty
for failure to comply with the con-
tract is something the board OBJ
ligingly overlooked in making the
new contract.


1t is evident that poor care is
given the street lights and that
there is no marked disposition on
the part of the company to see that
they are lit nightly. This care
lessness is especially favorable to
the crooks now operating in the
city, matter that, of course, does
not bother the company.
